calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption & Payment For Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Paula Skerson, Esq., for Plaintiff Westlake Services LLC, dba Westlake Financial Services.
No other appearances
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, Court reporter,

Matter is called at 9:30 a.m. No appearance was made at that time and the matter was taken under submission. At 9:50 a.m. Paul Skerston, counsel for plaintiff appears by ZOOM. Matter is recalled.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES LLC DBA WESTLAKE FINANCIAL'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is granted in part and denied in part. Judgment debtor to pay $200.00 per pay period.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
